data.title: 国际服歌曲「Someday Cartainly」MV公布
data.summary: Sensei! The Korean version of the “Someday Certainly” MV is out now! Could you take a listen to Suzu
data.body:
Sensei! The Korean version of the “Someday Certainly” MV is out now!

Could you take a listen to Suzumi’s firm resolution in the soothing melody?

➡️ Learn More: https://youtu.be/0j-xIUVfTCY?si=zr-ue-Bdm3omjtYk

#BlueArchive
